template.name: Account Research — Tier 1 Executive Brief
template.description: Multi-source Claygent account brief generator. Per-account: strategic priorities + recent news + funding history + hiring posture + leadership + competitive context + product launches + risk signals + entry-point hypothesis. Output: in-Clay summary + optional Markdown export per account.
template.estimated_cost_per_row: 40-70 credits per Tier 1 account at STANDARD depth
required_resources: Claygent (use-ai, Sonnet for STANDARD, Opus for DEEP)
Champify or UserGems (optional, for leadership changes)

columns.name: pass_1_qualified
columns.formula_text: AND(industry IN [{{ICP_INDUSTRIES}}], employee_count >= {{ICP_SIZE_MIN}}, employee_count <= {{ICP_SIZE_MAX}}, hq_country IN [{{ICP_GEO}}])
columns.notes: Cheap gate — DEEP research only runs on gate=TRUE

columns.name: strategic_priorities
columns.claygent_prompt:
ROLE: Strategy analyst for a B2B SaaS account exec.

CONTEXT:
- Company: {company_name}, {industry}, {employee_count} emp, {hq_country}
- LinkedIn: {linkedin_company_url}

SOURCES (max 3):
1. Their about/mission page
2. Recent earnings call OR quarterly update (if public co)
3. CEO/CFO LinkedIn posts in the last 90 days

TASK:
Identify the TOP 3 stated strategic priorities for the next 12 months. Return JSON:
{
  "priorities": [
    {"priority": "string (15-30 words)", "evidence_url": "string", "who_owns_it": "role title"},
    ...
  ],
  "confidence": "high|medium|low"
}

FALLBACK: If <2 priorities surface, return confidence: "low" and what you found.
columns.notes: Costs scale with max_sources; STANDARD = 3 sources

columns.name: recent_news_90d
columns.claygent_prompt:
ROLE: News analyst.

List up to 5 news items about {company_name} from the last 90 days.

Return JSON: {"items": [{"date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "headline": "string", "url": "string", "category": "product|funding|leadership|partnership|customer_win|risk|other"}]}

FALLBACK: empty array if no news.

columns.name: funding_history
columns.notes: Crunchbase as fallback if Predictleads not connected

columns.name: hiring_posture
leadership_team
recent_leadership_changes
columns.notes: Optional — only if Champify or UserGems connected

columns.name: competitive_context
risk_signals
entry_point_hypothesis
columns.notes: Opus model recommended for DEEP depth; Sonnet sufficient for STANDARD

columns.name: brief_summary_markdown
columns.formula_text:
CONCAT("# ", company_name, " — Tier 1 Account Brief

**Industry:** ", industry, " · **Size:** ", employee_count, " · **HQ:** ", hq_country, "

## Strategic Priorities
", strategic_priorities.priorities, "

## Recent News (90d)
", recent_news_90d.items, "

## Hiring Signal
", hiring_posture.signal, " — ", hiring_posture.total_open_roles, " open roles

## Leadership
", leadership_team.executives, "

## Competitive Context
", competitive_context, "

## Risk Signals
", risk_signals.risk_flags, "

## Entry Point
**Target:** ", entry_point_hypothesis.entry_point.who_to_target, "
**Why them:** ", entry_point_hypothesis.entry_point.why_them, "
**Opening angle:** ", entry_point_hypothesis.entry_point.opening_angle, "
**Timing rationale:** ", entry_point_hypothesis.entry_point.timing_rationale, "
")
columns.notes: Concat-style markdown brief — exports cleanly to Notion or Obsidian

verification_checklist: 5-row sample: strategic_priorities surfaces 2+ priorities with evidence URLs
5-row sample: entry_point_hypothesis returns coherent who+why+angle (not generic)
Run /clay-claygent-iterator on entry_point_hypothesis prompt before scaling past 50 rows
brief_summary_markdown renders cleanly in Notion / Obsidian (no broken JSON refs)
Cost per qualified account stays under 70 credits at STANDARD depth
